description.para: Some of the registers are configurable at hardware build time such that may or may not exist in the hardware.

briefdescription.para: PCI Express hard core configuration register offset.
Root Port MSI Base 1 Register Upper 32 bits from 64 bit address are written.
Root Port MSI Base 2 Register Lower 32 bits from 64 bit address are written.
Root Port Error FIFO Read Register.
Root Port Interrupt FIFO Read1 Register.
Root Port Interrupt FIFO Read2 Register.
AXIBAR to PCIBAR translation 0 lower 32 bits.
AXIBAR to PCIBAR translation 1 upper 32 bits.
AXIBAR to PCIBAR translation 1 lower 32 bits.
AXIBAR to PCIBAR translation 2 upper 32 bits.
AXIBAR to PCIBAR translation 2 lower 32 bits.
AXIBAR to PCIBAR translation 3 upper 32 bits.
AXIBAR to PCIBAR translation 3 lower 32 bits.
AXIBAR to PCIBAR translation 4 upper 32 bits.
AXIBAR to PCIBAR translation 4 lower 32 bits.
AXIBAR to PCIBAR translation 5 upper 32 bits.
AXIBAR to PCIBAR translation 5 lower 32 bits.

sectiondef.header: Bridge Info Register bitmaps and masks
Bridge Status & Control Register bitmaps and masks
Interrupt Decode Register bitmaps and masks
Interrupt Mask Register bitmaps and masks
Bus Location Register bitmaps and masks

briefdescription.para: Requester ID Device Number Shift Value.
Requester ID Bus Number Shift Value.
Requester ID Bus Number Shift Value.

sectiondef.header: PHY Status & Control Register bitmaps and masks

briefdescription.para: Directed Link Width to change Mask.
Directed Link Width Speed to change Mask.
Directed Link Change change to reliability or Autonomus Mask.
Directed Link Width to change Shift.
Directed Link Width Speed to change Shift.
Directed Link change to reliability or Autonomus Shift.

sectiondef.header: Root Port Status/Control Register bitmaps and masks

briefdescription.para: Root Port Error FIFO Not Empty.
Root Port Interrupt FIFO Not Empty.
Root Port Error FIFO Empty Shift.
Root Port Error FIFO Overflow Shift.
Root Port Interrupt FIFO Empty Shift.
Root Port Interrupt FIFO Overflow Shift.

sectiondef.header: Root Port MSI Base Register bitmaps and masks

briefdescription.para: Upper 32 bits of 64 bit MSI Base Address.
Lower 32 bits of 64 bit MSI Base Address.

sectiondef.header: Root Port Error FIFO Read Register bitmaps and masks
Root Port Interrupt FIFO Read 1 Register bitmaps and masks

briefdescription.para: Whether Interrupt is MSI or INTx.

sectiondef.header: Root Port Interrupt FIFO Read 2 Register bitmaps and masks
ECAM Address Register bitmaps and masks

briefdescription.para: Lookup the device configuration based on the unique device ID.

detaileddescription.para: The table ConfigTable contains the configuration info for each device in the system.

parameterdescription.para: is the device identifier to lookup.

listitem.para: XAxiPcie configuration structure pointer if DeviceID is found.
NULL if DeviceID is not found.

briefdescription.para: Initialize the XAxiPcie instance provided by the caller based on the given Config structure.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.The memory of the pointer references must be pre-allocated by the caller.
is the device configuration structure containing required HW build data.
is the Physical address of the hardware in a Virtual Memory operating system environment.It is the Base Address in a stand alone environment.

briefdescription.para: This API is used to read the VSEC Capability Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.

is a VSEC register number as there are two registers. Possible values are.
XAXIPCIE_VSEC1 (0)
XAXIPCIE_VSEC2 (1)
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the Vendor Specific Enhanced Capability ID.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will . pass back the Version of VSEC.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the Next Capability offset.

briefdescription.para: This API is used to read the VSEC Header Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.

is a VSEC register number as there are two registers. Possible values are.
XAXIPCIE_VSEC1 (0)
XAXIPCIE_VSEC2 (1)
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the VSEC header structure Id.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the Revision of VSEC capability Structure.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass . back the length of the VSEC capability structure.

briefdescription.para: This API Reads the Bridge info register.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable indicating whether underlying PCIe block support PCIe Gen2 Speed.
is a pointer to a variable indication whether underlying PCIe block is root port.
is a pointer to a variable where it indicates ECAM size. Value is between 1 to 8. Total address bits dedicated to ECAM is 20 + ECAM size.
is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the bus number of requester ID assigned to IP.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the device number of requester ID assigned to IP.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the function number of requester ID assigned to IP.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the Port number of requester ID assigned to IP.

briefdescription.para: This API is used to read the Phy Status/Control Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back Current physical status.
is the PCIe component to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the root port status.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Write Value in Root Port Status/Control Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is data to set.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Write MSI Base Address to Root Port MSI Base Address Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is 64 bit base address for MSI.This address should be 4kB aligned always.

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS if success or XST_FAILURE if failure .
This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Read Root Port Error FIFO Message.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the requester Id of error message.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the type of error message
is a variable where the driver will pass back the status of read operation of error message.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Clear Root Port Error FIFO Message.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Read Root Port Interrupt FIFO message Register 1 & 2.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the requester Id of error message.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the MSI address for which interrupt message received.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the type of interrupt message received (MSI/INTx).
is a variable where the driver will pass back the status of read operation of interrupt message.
is a variable where the driver will pass back the MSI data received.

simplesect.para: MsiMsgData if MSI interrupt is observed or 0 if there is no MSI interrupt.
This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

briefdescription.para: Clear Root Port FIFO Interrupt message Register 1 & 2.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.Clearing any one Interrupt FIFO register clears both registers.

briefdescription.para: Read PCIe address translation vector that corresponds to one of AXI local bus bars passed by the caller.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.
is AXI bar number (0 - 5) passed by caller.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will . pass back translation vector.

briefdescription.para: Write PCIe address translation vector that corresponds to one of AXI local bus bars passed by the caller.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.
is AXI bar number (0 - 5) passed by caller.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back translation vector.

briefdescription.para: Read 32-bit value from one of this IP own configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.
from beginning of IP own configuration space.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the value read from the specified location.

briefdescription.para: Write 32-bit value to one of this IP own configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
from beginning of IP own configuration space.
to be written to the specified location.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex.

memberdef.argsstring: (XAxiPcie *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u16 Offset, u32 *DataPtr)
memberdef.name: XAxiPcie_ReadRemoteConfigSpace

briefdescription.para: Read 32-bit value from external PCIe Function's configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: External PCIe function is identified by its Requester ID (Bus#, Device#, Function#). Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is the external PCIe function's Bus number.
is the external PCIe function's Device number.
is the external PCIe function's Function number.
from beggininng of PCIe function's configuration space.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the value read from the specified location.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex. The XAxiPcie_ReadLocalConfigSpace API should be used for reading the local config space.

memberdef.argsstring: (XAxiPcie *InstancePtr, u8 Bus, u8 Device, u8 Function, u16 Offset, u32 Data)
memberdef.name: XAxiPcie_WriteRemoteConfigSpace

briefdescription.para: Write 32-bit value to external PCIe function's configuration space.

detaileddescription.para: External PCIe function is identified by its Requester ID (Bus#, Device#, Function#). Location is identified by its offset from the beginning of the configuration space.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIe component to operate on.
is the external PCIe function's Bus number.
is the external PCIe function's Device number.
is the external PCIe function's Function number.
from beggininng of PCIe function's configuration space.
to be written to the specified location.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex. The XAxiPcie_WriteLocalConfigSpace should be used for writing to local config space.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.

simplesect.para: This bit is in the Bridge Status and Control Register.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.

simplesect.para: This bit is in the Bridge Status and Control Register.

briefdescription.para: Enable the IP interrupt bits passed into "EnableMask".

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.
is the bit pattern for interrupts wanted to be enabled.

simplesect.para: If an interrupt is already enabled before calling this function, it will stay enabled regardless of the value of "EnableMask" passed from the caller.

briefdescription.para: Disable the IP interrupt bits passed into "DisableMask".

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.
is the bit pattern for interrupts wanted to be disabled.

simplesect.para: If an interrupt is already disabled before calling this function, it will stay disabled regardless of the value of "DisableMask" passed from the caller.

briefdescription.para: Get the currently enabled interrupt bits of the IP and pass them back to the caller into "EnabledMask".

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the enabled interrupt bits after reading them from IP.

briefdescription.para: Get the currently pending interrupt bits of the IP and pass them back to the caller into "PendingMask".

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.
is a pointer to a variable where the driver will pass back the pending interrupt bits after reading them from IP.

briefdescription.para: Clear the currently pending interrupt bits of the IP passed from the caller into "ClearMask".

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.
is the bit pattern for pending interrupts wanted to be cleared.

briefdescription.para: Check whether link is up or not.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.

briefdescription.para: Check whether ECAM is busy or not.

parameterdescription.para: is the XAxiPcie instance to operate on.

simplesect.para: This function is valid only when IP is configured as a root complex

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the PCIe.
is the register offset.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XAxiPcie_ReadReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the PCIe.
is the register offset.
is the data to write.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XAxiPcie_WriteReg(u32 BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

detaileddescription.para: This is a guide on how to move from using the plbv46pcie driver to use xaxipcie driver.
This header file contains identifiers and basic driver functions for the XAxiPcie device driver.
This file contains a configuration table that specifies the configuration of AXI PCIe devices in the system.

para.preformatted: Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- --------------------------------------------------- 1.00a rkv 03/03/11 Original code. 2.00a rkv 07/19/11 Added support of pcie root complex functionality.

Ver Who Date Changes
1.00a rkv 03/03/11 Original code. 2.00a nm 09/19/11 Root port related changes are done.

Ver Who Date Changes ----- ---- -------- ------------------------------------------------------- 1.00a rkv 03/21/11 First release 2.00a nm 10/19/11 Added support of PCIe root complex functionality. The Root Port/Root Complex is available only in the 7 series families.

detaileddescription.para: The API for xaxipcie driver is similar to plbv46pcie driver. The prefix for the API functions and structures is XAxiPcie_ for the xaxipcie driver.
Due to hardware feature changes, some new API's are added and some API names are changed.

We present AXI PCIE API functions:
That Map with PLBv46PCIE
That are new API functions
That have been removed

para.bold: AXI PCIE API Functions that maps with PLBv46PCIE API

para.preformatted: plbv46pcie driver | xaxipcie driver ----------------------------------------------------------------------- XPcie_LookupConfig( ) | XAxiPcie_LookupConfig(...) XPcie_CfgInitialize(...) | XAxiPcie_CfgInitialize(...) XPcie_GetRequesterID(...) | XAxiPcie_GetRequesterID(...) XPcie_SetRequesterID(...) | ............................ XPcie_GetLinkStatus(...) | XAxiPcie_IsLinkUp(...) XPcie_GetLocalBusBar2PcieBar(...)| XAxiPcie_GetLocalBusBar2PcieBar(...) XPcie_SetLocalBusBar2PcieBar(...)| XAxiPcie_SetLocalBusBar2PcieBar(...) XPcie_ReadLocalConfigSpace(...) | XAxiPcie_ReadLocalConfigSpace(...) XPcie_WriteLocalConfigSpace(...) | XAxiPcie_WriteLocalConfigSpace(...) XPcie_EnableInterrupts(...) | XAxiPcie_EnableInterrupts(...) XPcie_DisableInterrupts(...) | XAxiPcie_DisableInterrupts(...) XPcie_GetEnabledInterrupts(...) | XAxiPcie_GetEnabledInterrupts(...) XPcie_GetPendingInterrupts(...) | XAxiPcie_GetPendingInterrupts(...) XPcie_ClearPendingInterrupts(...)| XAxiPcie_ClearPendingInterrupts(...) XPcie_SetRequesterID(...) | XAxiPcie_SetRequesterID(...) XPcie_EnablePCIeConnection(...) | No enable feature in hardware. XPcie_DisablePCIeConnection(..) | No Disable feature in hardware. XPcie_ReadRemoteConfigSpace(..) | XAxiPcie_ReadRemoteConfigSpace(..) XPcie_WriteRemoteConfigSpace(..) | XAxiPcie_WriteRemoteConfigSpace(..)

listitem.para: void XAxiPcie_GetVsecCapability(XAxiPcie *InstancePtr, u8 VsecNum, u16 *VsecIdPtr, u8 *VersionPtr, u16 *NextCapPtr)
void XAxiPcie_GetVsecHeader(XAxiPcie *InstancePtr, u8 VsecNum, u16 *VsecIdPtr, u8 *RevisionPtr, u16 *LengthPtr)
int XAxiPcie_SetRootPortMSIBase(XAxiPcie *InstancePtr, unsigned long long MsiBase)
int XAxiPcie_GetRootPortIntFIFOReg(XAxiPcie *InstancePtr, u16 *ReqIdPtr, u16 *MsiAddr, u8 *MsiInt, u8 *IntValid, u16 *MsiMsgData)

para.bold: API Functions That Have Been Removed
